TJ Ware for Congress

A cleaner, more credible campaign platform for winning trust in North Texas.

The rebuild keeps the campaign's story and action paths intact, then presents them with stronger hierarchy, clearer credibility, and a much more premium conversion flow.

Official campaign website for TJ Ware for Congress | Texas District 24

JoinDonate
Texas District 24

North Texas deserves representation that feels present, prepared, and impossible to dismiss.

This district page is rebuilt to do two jobs at once: prove local relevance to voters while still feeling credible to donors, press, and coalition partners.

The new structure reframes the district story around affordability, practical growth, infrastructure resilience, and public trust. It removes builder-grade clutter and replaces it with a clearer local narrative, better scanability, and stronger action paths on every screen size.

Take the voter surveySee event paths

District standard

Local relevance

The page should make it obvious that the campaign is speaking to actual communities in District 24, not broadcasting generic national copy.

District standard

Serious priorities

Voters, donors, and press need a fast read on what this campaign wants to fix for families, employers, and neighborhoods.

District standard

Easy next step

The strongest district pages do not stop at storytelling. They route people into survey, events, and direct outreach without friction.

Communities in focus

This campaign is built for a real district with real places, not one narrow lane of voters.

The live site already names the communities across the seat. The rebuild turns that information into a cleaner visual signal of breadth and local presence.

AddisonArlingtonCarrolltonCoppellDallasEulessFort WorthFriscoGrapevineLewisvilleRichardsonSouthlake

Family economics

Lower pressure on housing, healthcare, and day-to-day costs.

The public platform keeps coming back to middle-class breathing room: wages, affordability, housing access, and a less rigged economy.

Growth with backbone

Support North Texas business growth without selling out the public.

District 24 is framed as a place of builders, employers, and working families that deserves practical growth instead of insider favoritism.

Prepared communities

Take disaster readiness and infrastructure resilience seriously.

Flood response, storm recovery, food security, and public preparedness appear repeatedly across the campaign's media and policy posture.

Fairness and safety

Push for public safety without abandoning fairness or civil rights.

The public message pairs accountability, anti-corruption, and sensible criminal-justice reform with a clear rejection of cruelty and performative chaos.

District voice

Tell the campaign what families, employers, and neighborhoods in TX-24 need most.

A premium campaign site should feel collaborative, not just declarative. The survey, speaking-request path, and events funnel all stay one click away so the district page moves visitors from interest into action.

Take the surveyInvite TJ to speak
